ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the component */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series of the component */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "manufacturer_part_no" TEXT /* Manufacturer's part number */,
  "datasheet_link" TEXT /* Link to the datasheet of the component */,
  "detail_link" TEXT /* Link to the detailed specifications of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range */,
  "power_consumption" TEXT /* Power consumption */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the component information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the series belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the series information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasheets" (
  "datasheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datasheet */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the datasheet belongs to */,
  "datasheet_link" TEXT /* Link to the datasheet */,
  "datasheet_file" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the datasheet */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the datasheet version */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the datasheet file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datasheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Number of Transmitters, Number of Receivers) */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, sales team, engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the component */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_logs" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison event */,
  "component_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first component being compared */,
  "component_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second component being compared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_component_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_2") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_component_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_1") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the wishlist */,
  "wishlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the wishlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the wishlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlist_components" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wishlist */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the component in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
